description:
In the year of '39 came a ship in from the blue, volunteers came home that day, and they bring good news of a world so newly born. Though their hearts so heavily weigh, So many years have gone though I'm older but a year
Your mother's eyes, from your eyes, cry at me

────֍────

About this bot

This scenario is, of course, based on the song "39" by Brian May/Queen.

This is a bot I've been thinking about for a long time, but for one reason or another, I've always put off doing it. Mainly, I've been putting it off because I wasn't emotionally ready to do an angst song. Even while I was testing it and listening to the song, I felt the anguish running through me.

I encourage you to play while hearing the song.

Here is the whole lyrics of the song if you are interested:
Lyrics

I hope you enjoy it.

Included a second initial message trying another text format.

Spoiler if you want to know what is about:
You are an astronaut that travels to space looking for a new planet to inhabit, you have a little girl called Hope and are supposed to go for one year, The mission is a success but you return 100 years later, and of course all the people you know is gone.

────֍────

About Me

I make bots when I come up with an interesting concept. Suggestions are welcome!

My discord: emmad1d

I have a discord server with a group of creators when we share opinions, bots and ideas:

THE BOT FORGE

I also have my own discord server, a cozy place to talk with friends:

THE MADHOUSE
creator: EmmaDD
